description: This Stitch character backpack is perfect for fans of the beloved Lilo & Stitch movie. Featuring a playful design of Stitch on the front, this blue backpack is ideal for school, day trips, or travel. With a spacious main compartment for books and daily essentials, plus a handy side mesh pocket for water bottles, it's practical and fun. The adjustable shoulder straps ensure a comfortable fit, making it a great choice for young children.
